notes: Round 3 re-reviewed `global-rescan-surface-regression-fix` at commit `bb6766206fa6ec792ef6d46da3da2d9502a7d13d` via `.factory/validation/claude-platform-ux/scrutiny/reviews/global-rescan-surface-regression-fix.rerun.json`. The prior blocker is closed: the global `Rescan all skills` action now reruns Discover's real disk scan (`get_scan_roots` -> `start_project_scan`) while preserving Central reloads and live Claude/platform refresh behavior.
No blocking scrutiny issues remain for the `claude-platform-ux` milestone, so this milestone is cleared for the next validation stage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Prior synthesis suggested adding extra command-palette/global-search native validation guidance to shared skill/library docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: `.factory/library/user-testing.md` now explicitly documents the command-palette/global-search limitation and recommends targeted state-transition tests first, so no additional shared-state update is needed from this scrutiny round.
